Piece of Cake.title: The Gentle Opening
Piece of Cake.rule: You cannot play 1. e4 or 1. d4 as your first move.

Doughnut Elo.title: Sugar Rush
Doughnut Elo.rule: You must move your Queen at least once every 5 moves.

Doughnut Elo.title: I'm Committed
Doughnut Elo.rule: Once you move a piece onto your opponent's half of the board, that piece may not retreat back across the halfway line

Pinned Down.title: Watch Your Back
Pinned Down.rule: Every 4 moves, you have to make a backwards move.

Challenge.title: Grandmaster's Burden
Challenge.rule: You must play the entire game using only one hand and never touch the board with the other.
